Caracal OS

First Launch Setup

Wizard Steps

01

Account Details

Choose whether to update the username and password before first-run setup.

02

Mandatory Setup

Runs `ujust first-run` in a terminal window with the existing Caracal flow.

03

Reboot

Finish setup by rebooting so group membership and session changes take effect.

Current User

Loading...

Welcome to Caracal OS

Finish your first-run setup with the same Caracal look and flow.

This wizard can optionally set a new username and password, then launch the mandatory `ujust first-run` step before asking you to reboot.

Caracal Setup Wizard

Step 1

Account Details

Ready

Skipping this step keeps the current account details.

Progress

Setup Status

Idle

Account Details

Optional username and password update

This step is skipped unless you choose to change the account.

Mandatory Setup

Launch `ujust first-run`

The command runs in a real terminal so the existing prompts and sudo flow still work.

Finish

Reboot now

Reboot when the mandatory setup is done.

Event Feed

Wizard activity

Final Step

Reboot now to finish setup

The mandatory setup completed. Reboot now so your groups, shell changes, and session limits are fully applied.
